raw.objective: “…to establish an EHC model in order to evaluate the impact of sex as a covariate on VPA pharmacokinetics.
raw.covariates: Tested: SEX, WT, AGE, Contraceptive therapy (CT) Included: SEX, WT, CT
raw.observations: Longer lag time observed in females without contraceptive, and a lower VPA hepatic output, and higher reabsorption than in men. Thus sex-related PK differences are observed. EHC is found to be an important PK factor for VPA, a higher elimination is seen in men. No correlation found in VPA CL and dose/kg High correlation of model in GOF plot
raw.structure: 2 compartmental body model with elimination from central compartment, first order absorption,
raw.equations: Ka = (theta1-theta2*WT)*exp(eta1) V2= (theta3-theta4*(WT/70))*exp(eta2) V3 = theta5*exp(eta3) Q = theta6*exp(eta4) CL= (theta7*(1-SEX-CT)+(theta8*(SEX+CT))*exp(eta1))*exp(eta5) KE=CL/V2 Fe=(theta9*(1-SEX-CT)+theta10*(SEX+CT))*exp(eta6) ALAG1= (theta11*(1-SEX-CT)+theta12*(SEX+CT))*exp(eta7) TEHC= theta13*exp(eta8) KEHC= theta14*exp(eta9) #differential equation system IF(TIME<TEHC) KEHC=0 IF(TIME>TEHC) Fe=0 dA1/dt=-Ka*A1 dA2/dt=Ka*A1 –KE*A2 +K32*A3 –K23*A2 +KEHC*A4 dA3/dt=K23*A2 –K32*A3 dA4/dt=Fe*Ke*A2 –KEHC*A4 Cipred=A2/V2 Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1) Dose: VPA dose in mg WT: body weight (kg) S: Sex (1: men, 0: women) CT: Contraceptive therapy (1:yes, 0:no)
raw.parameter_values: theta1= 2.91 theta2= 0.0184 theta3= 9.60 theta4= 0.134 theta5= 4.95 theta6= 0.559 theta7= 0.581 theta8= 0.900 theta9= 0.462 theta10= 0.218 theta11= 2.21 theta12= 2.00 theta13= 8.27 theta14= 1.20 omega1=0.0578 omega2=0.0439 omega3=0.0555 omega4=0.0253 omega5=0.0440 omega6=0.1561 omega7=0.1329 omega8=0.0351 omega9=0.1395 sigma1= 0.00524

extraction_target.residual_error: Ka = (theta1-theta2*WT)*exp(eta1) V2= (theta3-theta4*(WT/70))*exp(eta2) V3 = theta5*exp(eta3) Q = theta6*exp(eta4) CL= (theta7*(1-SEX-CT)+(theta8*(SEX+CT))*exp(eta1))*exp(eta5) KE=CL/V2 Fe=(theta9*(1-SEX-CT)+theta10*(SEX+CT))*exp(eta6) ALAG1= (theta11*(1-SEX-CT)+theta12*(SEX+CT))*exp(eta7) TEHC= theta13*exp(eta8) KEHC= theta14*exp(eta9) #differential equation system IF(TIME<TEHC) KEHC=0 IF(TIME>TEHC) Fe=0 dA1/dt=-Ka*A1 dA2/dt=Ka*A1 –KE*A2 +K32*A3 –K23*A2 +KEHC*A4 dA3/dt=K23*A2 –K32*A3 dA4/dt=Fe*Ke*A2 –KEHC*A4 Cipred=A2/V2 Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1) Dose: VPA dose in mg WT: body weight (kg) S: Sex (1: men, 0: women) CT: Contraceptive therapy (1:yes, 0:no)
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: “…to establish an EHC model in order to evaluate the impact of sex as a covariate on VPA pharmacokinetics.

covariates.raw: Tested: SEX, WT, AGE, Contraceptive therapy (CT) Included: SEX, WT, CT

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
